temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a young man with messy dark hair and round glasses. He wears a dark, corduroy-style jacket. His expression is one of intense concern and concentration as he looks slightly off-camera. The background is dark and indistinct, with a cool, greenish light casting shadows across his face. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera remains steady, holding the tight focus on his worried face. The audio is filled with a slow, somber, and melancholic orchestral score. The music is atmospheric and suspenseful, with deep, resonant strings creating a sense of mystery and foreboding. The melody is slow and deliberate, building a feeling of tension and anticipation, as if leading up to a significant and serious moment. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the powerful, emotional music to dominate the soundscape. The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing the young man standing in a vast, dark, and cluttered room. The space is filled with an immense collection of objects, including what appear to be large, dark, shell-like structures, various pieces of furniture, and a tangle of ropes and wires. The room is dimly lit, creating a mysterious and slightly eerie atmosphere. The young man is now a small figure in the center of this chaotic environment, emphasizing the scale of the surroundings. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.
